creator: william88@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

I've made a new patch to deal with easy-install.pth missing in newer
setuptools install.
Would you be able to make another exp-run with this:
http://people.freebsd.org/~wg/setuptools-v2.txt

Thank you very much!

-- 
William Grzybowski
------------------------------------------
Curitiba/PR - Brasil
